parameters-en.Rate: Controls the speed or rate of the flanger. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Width: Controls how wide and dramatic the flanging sweep appears.
parameters-en.Manual: Controls the degree of phase shifting. Has no affect when Width is set to 100%.
parameters-en.Regen: Controls the amount of feedback in the effected signal.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Headroom: Provides up to 12.0 dB of additional headroom.
